dossier.bio: Ms. Lin Chen — founder-operator in fintech, returning Rosewood guest; quiet routines, considered tastes.
conversationHooks: A Series B was announced in April; a light, congratulatory register is appropriate — no probing on terms or figures.
On her last Hong Kong stay she asked after Wong Kar-wai film locations — cinema and place may be a warmer thread than business.
handleWithCare: Across Phuket she declined alcohol throughout the stay; offer the non-alcoholic register first and let her ask if she wants otherwise.
Mornings are hers — a 6 AM beach-walk pattern in Phuket and a twice-used morning spa ritual in Hong Kong. Schedule lightly before 10:00.

suppressed.reason: Low-confidence identity verification risk; staff should never surface doubt about guest identity
STANDARD POS: 'defer to her framing' implies tracking/monitoring her sector positioning; remove inference of professional authority negotiation
Meta-instruction about CRM sources feels like surveillance scaffolding; staff should simply know what to reference without caveats

reasoning: Prior HK stay (Oct 2025): thermostat noted at 19°C; preferences.roomTempC = 19.
Prior HK stay (Oct 2025): praised suite sandalwood scent; preferences.scent = sandalwood — overrides Crillon default of rose absolute.
Prior HK stay (Feb 2026): requested down-free pillows; preferences.pillows = down-free — overrides Crillon default of down.
preferences.audio = silence; Phuket highlight praised the property's quiet.
Lighting kept ambient-low to match the silence register and her early-morning rhythm.

welcomeAmenity.name: Maison Plisson seasonal preserves
welcomeAmenity.story: The grocer-restaurant Parisians treat as a private pantry
welcomeAmenity.reasoning: Pescatarian-safe and alcohol-free — she declined alcohol throughout Phuket, so the Champagne demi is set aside. A pantry gesture rather than a pastry flight reads quieter; it echoes the lemongrass-honey tasting set she loved in Phuket (artisan, jarred, unhurried) without repeating it.

itinerary.title: Private morning at Musée d'Orsay
itinerary.whyHere: Pre-opening access via Rosewood Placemaker; 8 min from property
itinerary.reasoning: Honors her early-morning rhythm (Phuket 6 AM walks; HK morning spa) and her cultural curiosity shown by the Wong Kar-wai inquiry. Placemaker Inès Marchand can host.

itinerary.title: Sense spa hammam ritual
itinerary.reasoning: She used the HK spa twice as a morning ritual; the Crillon's vaulted hammam is the property's sense-of-place answer and a natural continuation.

itinerary.title: Dinner at Les Ambassadeurs
itinerary.whyHere: Restored Marie-Antoinette dining room; pescatarian tasting on request
itinerary.reasoning: She loved Henry's tasting menu in Hong Kong; a pescatarian tasting at Banctel's restored room is the Crillon parallel. Pair non-alcoholic — alcohol declined in Phuket.

itinerary.title: Marais antique scarves with curator
itinerary.whyHere: Rue Vieille du Temple ateliers; a haute couture archivist guides
itinerary.reasoning: A quiet, expert-led walk in the register she prefers — small group, archival depth, no spectacle. An optional second-day offering.
